name: player_zar_write_vehicle_list_section
description: Player::ZAR_WriteVehicleListSection serializes VehicleList records from each player save state into ZAR section blobs.
binary_safe_evidence: VC5SP3 cl 11.00.7022 x86 /O2 /Ob0 /Zp4 /FAcs COFF byte comparison for ?ZAR_WriteVehicleListSection@Player@@YIHPAUzZbdSectionCallbackCtx@@PAX@Z at 0x41f6a0 passed with zero unmasked mismatches after masking 12 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 417 bytes and the VC object symbol is 432 bytes with 15 trailing VC NOP bytes trimmed.

The native smoke verifies the VehicleList/<root-node-name> record path and the 128-byte serialized vehicle record, including world pose, vehicle rotation, AI state fields, status meter fields, nanite panel level, and local modal master type.
